summary: Iteration 7 end-to-end verified. Backend: all 5 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py pass (interested_in filter match, private exclusion, case-insensitivity, send-message round-trip + threads update with unread, self-message 400 guard). Full backend suite: 88 passed, 3 skipped, 5 pre-existing failures unchanged from iter 3–6 (TestDiscoveryAndLikes seed-dependent + test_post_with_mp4_via_media — explicitly out of scope). Frontend: signed up fresh TEST_i7t_* user via UI, navigated to /discovery (24 cards rendered). Interest chip bar (data-testid=discovery-interest-bar) renders all 6 chips: any/casual/doubles/league/tournament/putt. Clicking 'doubles' refetched to 9 cards; clicking 'any' restored to 24 cards. Inline compose flow: clicking 💬 Message on a card opened MessageComposeModal (recipient pre-filled), typing + Send closed the modal, the discovery-toast '✅ Message sent to Test I7' flashed (verified by polling within 2s — auto-dismisses at 2200ms), URL stayed on /discovery. ESC closed the modal. Inner click did NOT close (count stayed 1). Overlay click (corner) closed the modal. /messages page: messages-new-btn header CTA + messages-empty-compose-btn right-pane CTA both rendered for a fresh user (empty inbox), both open MessageComposeModal in pickFromFriends mode (message-compose-search input + 0 friend rows for fresh user, expected). PlayerProfile (/players/{uid}): player-profile-message-btn opens the same MessageComposeModal; after Send modal closes, player-profile-action-msg paragraph renders '✅ Message sent', URL still /players/{uid}. All regression checks (radius bar, location hint, discovery cards/actions wiring, threads aggregation, unread counts) still working.
action_items: (Carry-over from iter 3–6) 5 seed-dependent tests in test_api.py + test_new_features.py still fail in the full suite. Not a regression; out of scope per explicit iteration note. Re-enable seed_demo_users behind a DEV flag or rewrite those tests to seed their own fixtures.
critical_code_review_comments: Discovery.jsx flashToast auto-dismisses at 2200ms which is fine for users, but automated tests must poll within that window. Consider extending to 3500ms or making the toast persist until user-dismiss for slightly better UX (and easier QA).

MessageComposeModal.jsx — overlay click closes via overlay onClick={onClose} with stopPropagation on the inner panel. Verified correct: inner click count stays 1, overlay-corner click closes. Good defensive pattern.

PlayerProfile.jsx — Message button uses data-testid=player-profile-message-btn while the inline confirmation paragraph uses data-testid=player-profile-action-msg (rendered conditionally on actionMsg state). Both testids match the spec; the review request wording mixes them slightly so confirm that the spec's '(data-testid=player-profile-action-msg)' refers to the inline confirmation text, not the button — which is the current implementation.

discovery_router.py interested_in query param uses case-insensitive regex on the interestedIn field and excludes privacy.interestedIn=true via $or — verified by 3 backend tests covering match + private exclusion + case-insensitive.
matchStore.js deckInterestedIn threading into fetchDeck/loadMoreDeck via interested_in query — verified end-to-end through the UI filter change refetching the deck.

success_rate.backend: 100% on iteration-7 features (5/5 in test_iteration7.py). Full suite: 88 passed, 3 skipped, 5 pre-existing failures unchanged.
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-7 features. Interest chip bar, inline compose modal (Discovery card + PlayerProfile + Messages new/empty), ESC + overlay + inner click behavior, post-send toast and inline confirmation, URL stays on origin page — all verified.

test_credentials: Signed up TEST_i7t_<random>@example.com via UI signup (Firebase Identity Toolkit). Backend tests create TEST_i7v_/TEST_i7dbl_/TEST_i7priv_* users and clean up via accounts:delete. Password demo1234.
seed_data_creation: None. Ephemeral users created per test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py (5 tests). Run only: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iteration7.py -v`. Full regression: 88 passed + 5 pre-existing failures (test_api.py TestDiscoveryAndLikes seed-dependent + test_post_with_mp4_via_media). Iteration-7 selectors: discovery-interest-bar, interest-option-{any|casual|doubles|league|tournament|putt}, discovery-reset-radius (now resets BOTH radius and interestedIn), message-compose-{modal,overlay,close,search,pick-{uid},change-recipient,textarea,send,error}, messages-new-btn, messages-empty-new-btn, messages-empty-compose-btn, player-profile-message-btn (the button) vs player-profile-action-msg (the post-send inline confirmation paragraph). NOTE: Discovery toast (discovery-toast) auto-dismisses at 2200ms — for automated tests, poll within ~2s of clicking Send. The compose modal in pickFromFriends mode renders an empty friend list for fresh users (matchStore.fetchFriends() returns []); this is correct behavior. The post-signup landing page is /feed (not /discovery) — navigate explicitly to /discovery for the deck. Inner panel onClick uses e.stopPropagation so clicks inside the modal body do not close; overlay onClick={onClose} closes.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial false-negative when checking discovery-toast was a test-timing artifact (toast auto-dismisses at 2200ms; test waited 2500ms before checking). Re-test polling within 2s confirmed toast renders correctly. All other iteration-7 features land exactly per spec: backend filter via case-insensitive regex with privacy strip, frontend chip bar wired via deckInterestedIn store action, MessageComposeModal reused in 3 places (Discovery card, PlayerProfile button, Messages page header + empty-state CTAs) with two modes (fixed recipient vs pickFromFriends), proper ESC + overlay + inner-click semantics, post-send toast/inline confirmation, URL preservation.
